# @initbase/react-datetime-picker

> A lightweight, zero-dependency date and time picker library for React 18+.

## Quick links

- Docs: https://initbase.github.io/react-datetime-picker/docs/intro
- Demo: https://initbase.github.io/react-datetime-picker/demo/
- GitHub: https://github.com/initbase/react-datetime-picker
- NPM: https://www.npmjs.com/package/@initbase/react-datetime-picker
- Support: https://ko-fi.com/burhanahmeed

## Deploy

The site is deployed to GitHub Pages via GitHub Actions. On every push to `main`, a workflow builds the UI package, Docusaurus docs, and Vite demo, copies the demo build into `apps/docs/build/demo/`, and deploys the combined output to the `gh-pages` environment.

## Key features

- Zero dependencies — all date logic uses plain `Date` + `Intl.DateTimeFormat`
- Controlled and uncontrolled modes (similar to `<input>` pattern)
- Single date, time, date+time, and range variants
- 12h/24h time format, seconds support, configurable minute/second steps
- CSS custom properties for easy theming (prefix `--rdp-*`)
- Flexible popover positioning with viewport-aware flipping
- Full TypeScript types

## Install & peer dependencies

```bash
npm install @initbase/react-datetime-picker
```

Requires `react >= 18` and `react-dom >= 18`.

## Import

```tsx
// Components
import { DatePicker, TimePicker, DateTimePicker, DateRangePicker, TimeRangePicker, DateTimeRangePicker } from '@initbase/react-datetime-picker';

// Styles (must be imported separately)
import '@initbase/react-datetime-picker/datetime-picker.css';
```

## Basic usage

### DatePicker

```tsx
import { useState } from 'react';
import { DatePicker } from '@initbase/react-datetime-picker';

function Example() {
  const [value, setValue] = useState<Date | null>(null);
  return (
    <DatePicker value={value} onChange={setValue} placeholder="Pick a date" />
  );
}
```

### DateRangePicker

```tsx
import { useState } from 'react';
import { DateRangePicker } from '@initbase/react-datetime-picker';

function Example() {
  const [value, setValue] = useState<[Date | null, Date | null]>([null, null]);
  return (
    <DateRangePicker value={value} onChange={setValue} placeholder="Pick a range" />
  );
}
```

### TimePicker

```tsx
import { useState } from 'react';
import { TimePicker } from '@initbase/react-datetime-picker';

function Example() {
  const [value, setValue] = useState<Date | null>(null);
  return (
    <TimePicker value={value} onChange={setValue} />
  );
}
```

### DateTimePicker

```tsx
import { useState } from 'react';
import { DateTimePicker } from '@initbase/react-datetime-picker';

function Example() {
  const [value, setValue] = useState<Date | null>(null);
  return (
    <DateTimePicker value={value} onChange={setValue} />
  );
}
```

### TimeRangePicker

```tsx
import { useState } from 'react';
import { TimeRangePicker } from '@initbase/react-datetime-picker';

function Example() {
  const [value, setValue] = useState<[Date | null, Date | null]>([null, null]);
  return (
    <TimeRangePicker value={value} onChange={setValue} />
  );
}
```

### DateTimeRangePicker

```tsx
import { useState } from 'react';
import { DateTimeRangePicker } from '@initbase/react-datetime-picker';

function Example() {
  const [value, setValue] = useState<[Date | null, Date | null]>([null, null]);
  return (
    <DateTimeRangePicker value={value} onChange={setValue} />
  );
}
```

## Common props

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `value` | `Date \| null` / `[Date\|null, Date\|null]` | — | Controlled value |
| `onChange` | `(value) => void` | — | Change handler |
| `placeholder` | `string` | — | Placeholder text |
| `position` | `'bottom' \| 'top' \| 'flexible'` | `'flexible'` | Popover position |
| `step` | `number` | `1` | Minute/second step intervals |
| `use12h` | `boolean` | `false` | 12-hour format |
| `showSeconds` | `boolean` | `false` | Show seconds column |
| `className` | `string` | — | Additional CSS class |
| `style` | `React.CSSProperties` | — | Inline styles |

## Value types

```typescript
type DateValue = Date | null;
type DateRangeValue = [Date | null, Date | null];
```

## Theming

Customize via CSS custom properties on `.rdp-wrapper`:

```
--rdp-primary: #4f46e5;
--rdp-primary-hover: #4338ca;
--rdp-text: #111827;
--rdp-text-muted: #9ca3af;
--rdp-border: #e5e7eb;
--rdp-border-radius: 8px;
--rdp-font-size: 14px;
--rdp-cell-size: 36px;
```

All class names are prefixed with `rdp-`. Apply CSS custom properties inline or in a stylesheet targeting `.rdp-wrapper`.

### Example: green theme

```tsx
<DatePicker
  value={value}
  onChange={setValue}
  style={{
    '--rdp-primary': '#16a34a',
    '--rdp-primary-hover': '#15803d',
  } as React.CSSProperties}
/>
```

## Popover position

The `position` prop accepts `'bottom'`, `'top'`, or `'flexible'` (default). When `'flexible'`, the popover flips to the top if it would overflow the viewport at the bottom.

## Range selection

Range pickers use a two-click interaction model. The first click sets the start date, the second sets the end date. Hovering during the second click highlights the potential range.

## Uncontrolled usage

All pickers work uncontrolled by omitting `value` and just providing `onChange`:

```tsx
<DatePicker onChange={(v) => console.log(v)} placeholder="Pick a date" />
```
